# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

apiVersion: kong.kubernetes.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: api-management
spec:
  replicas: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api-gateway
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: kong
          image: docker.konghq.com/kong:2.4.0
          ports:
            - name: admin
              containerPort: 8001
              protocol: TCP
            - name: data
              containerPort: 8000
              protocol: TCP
            - name: api
              containerPort: 8443
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: KONG_DATABASE
              value: postgres
            - name: KONG_PG_HOST
              value: postgres-service
            - name: KONG_PG_PORT
              value: "5432"
            - name: KONG_ADMIN_LISTEN
              value: 0.0.0.0:8001
            - name: KONG_PROXY_LISTEN
              value: 0.0.0.0:8443, 0.0.0.0:8000
            - name: KONG_PG_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: postgres-password
                  key: password
          volumeMounts:
            - name: kong-data
              mountPath: /var/lib/kong
      volumes:
        - name: kong-data
          emptyDir: {}

---
apiVersion: kong.kubernetes.io/v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
spec:
  selector:
    app: api-gateway
  type: ClusterIP

---
apiVersion: kong.kubernetes.io/v1
kind: KongService
metadata:
  name: microservice-a
  namespace: microservice-a-namespace
spec:
  hostname: microservice-a.api-management.svc.cluster.local
  url: http://microservice-a-service:80

---
apiVersion: kong.kubernetes.io/v1
kind: KongService
metadata:
  name: microservice-b
  namespace: microservice-b-namespace
spec:
  hostname: microservice-b.api-management.svc.cluster.local
  url: http://microservice-b-service:80

---
apiVersion: kong.kubernetes.io/v1
kind: KongRoute
metadata:
  name: route-a
spec:
  service: microservice-a
  protocol: HTTP
  paths:
    - /api/a*

---
apiVersion: kong.kubernetes.io/v1
kind: KongRoute
metadata:
  name: route-b
spec:
  service: microservice-b
  protocol: HTTP
  paths:
    - /api/b*
